data.title: Ourgame Faces Trading Suspension Amid Uncertainty
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest announcement is out from Ourgame International Holdings Ltd ( (HK:6899) ).

Ourgame International Holdings Limited has announced a continued suspension of trading in its shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange due to unresolved issues that have led to the suspension. The company faces the risk of having its listing canceled if it does not comply with the resumption guidance and resolve the suspension issues by the deadline of September 27, 2025. The board advises shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution, noting significant uncertainty regarding the resumption of trading.

More about Ourgame International Holdings Ltd

Ourgame International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated under the laws of the Cayman Islands, operating in the gaming and entertainment industry. It primarily focuses on providing online card and board games, and has a significant presence in the Asian market.

YTD Price Performance: -20.0%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: €24.71M

data.title: AF Gruppen to Lead Valldalen Dam Upgrade for Hydro Energi
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

AF Gruppen ASA ( (AGRUF) ) just unveiled an update.

Hydro Energi AS has selected AF Gruppen to construct the Valldalen dam and flood diversion project, valued at NOK 200 million. This project aims to upgrade the dam to address climate change and increased flooding, enhancing the infrastructure supporting the Røldal power plant. The construction will involve demolishing the existing spillway and building a new concrete dam, expanding the floodwater side channel, and establishing a new flood tunnel. The work is set to begin in April 2025 and finish by June 2026, reflecting AF Gruppen’s strategic alignment with its expertise in civil engineering projects.

More about AF Gruppen ASA

AF Gruppen ASA is a leading construction and engineering company specializing in civil engineering, building, property, and energy sectors. The company has expertise in tunnels, concrete, and hydropower, allowing it to undertake large-scale infrastructure projects.

YTD Price Performance: 48.19%

Average Trading Volume: 858

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.59B

data.title: Cellebrite Achieves Strong 2024 Financial Performance with Significant ARR Growth
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest update is out from Cellebrite DI ( (CLBT) ).

Cellebrite reported strong financial results for 2024, achieving a significant 25% growth in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and maintaining a 25% adjusted EBITDA margin, signaling a ‘Rule of 50’ performance. The company experienced a 17% increase in fourth-quarter revenue, driven by a 21% rise in subscription revenue, while also achieving important milestones such as the FedRAMP High Ready designation for its Government Cloud platform. The firm announced leadership changes and strategic advancements, positioning it for sustained growth and profitability in 2025, with expectations of continued top-line expansion and robust free cash flow.

More about Cellebrite DI

Cellebrite DI Ltd. is a global leader in digital investigative solutions serving both the public and private sectors. The company specializes in providing advanced technology solutions to uncover digital evidence for criminal investigations, with a strong market focus on expanding its digital and cloud-based offerings.

data.title: Calian Group Hits Record Q1 Revenue Amid Global Defence Demand
data.description:

An announcement from Calian Group Ltd. ( (TSE:CGY) ) is now available.

Calian Group Ltd. reported its highest first-quarter revenue on record with a 3% increase to $185 million, despite a decline in organic growth offset by acquisitions. The company faces a reduction in profitability due to increased operational expenses and amortization charges, but remains optimistic about its future prospects, driven by global demand for defence solutions and potential increased military investment in Canada.

More about Calian Group Ltd.

Calian Group Ltd. is a diverse company offering innovative solutions in healthcare, communications, learning, and cybersecurity sectors. The company has a market focus on expanding its footprint in the global defence industry, particularly through its new U.S. subsidiary aimed at U.S. government and defence contracts.

Sidetrade SA ( (FR:ALBFR) ) has provided an update.

Sidetrade has announced a strategic alliance with Interpath, an international advisory firm, to accelerate digital transformation in businesses through AI-driven Order-to-Cash solutions. This collaboration is expected to enhance value creation for clients and expand Sidetrade’s market reach, while reshaping working capital management with transformative digital solutions.

More about Sidetrade SA

Sidetrade is a global leader in AI-powered Order-to-Cash applications, providing a SaaS platform that enhances cash flow processes using advanced AI technology. The company operates in over 85 countries and serves a diverse range of industries with clients such as Bidcorp, Engie, and Veolia. Sidetrade’s AI platform processes $6.1 trillion in B2B transactions daily, offering insights and automation to optimize working capital and productivity.

data.description:

Beghelli SPA ( (IT:BE) ) just unveiled an update.

Gewiss S.p.A. has acquired a controlling 75.04% stake in Beghelli S.p.A., prompting a mandatory public purchase offer for the remaining shares. This acquisition aims to delist Beghelli from Euronext Milan, with significant leadership changes following the purchase, potentially impacting Beghelli’s market dynamics and stakeholder interests.

More about Beghelli SPA

Founded in 1982, the Beghelli Group is a prominent player in the technical professional lighting industry, specializing in emergency lighting, photovoltaic systems, home automation, and security solutions. The company is known for its focus on technological innovation and product design, maintaining a strong market presence with operations in Europe, the Far East, and North America, and a commercial reach in over 140 countries.

data.title: Sino Green Land Delays Form 10-Q Filing
data.description:
Sino Green Land ( (SGLA) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Sino Green Land Corporation has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The delay is primarily due to the additional time needed to compile and analyze supporting documentation and to allow the company’s independent registered public accounting firm to complete its review of the condensed consolidated financial statements. The company anticipates that the report will be filed no later than five calendar days after its original due date. The company does not expect any significant changes in its financial results compared to the same period last year, and it is committed to maintaining compliance with filing requirements. The notification was signed by Wo Kuk Ching, the Chief Executive Officer.

More about Sino Green Land
